title: Match question order to the columns on the main board
excerpt:

posts.author: JRooney (Jennifer Rooney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Continuing the discussion from Form columns not in the correct order when viewing in Main Table:

Was there ever a resolution to this? I have created a form and have reordered the questions while building but now they don’t match that order in the main board. Looking for a quick solution rather than dragging and dropping each column in the correct order. Thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t know of a way to get the board to auto match the form. I normally start with the board and then create the form to avoid that issue.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: JRooney (Jennifer Rooney)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the tip that is a good idea. I think this would be an excellent update for Monday, especially since they already sync column titles.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Feature requests - monday Community Forum Maybe post it here?
